headerDisplay: Local LAN control for HomeMate 3+1 Tuya switch/fan panels. Add the device name, Tuya device ID, and local key; the plugin handles discovery, protocol version, and the fixed HomeMate DP map.

name.title: Device Name
name.description: Friendly name shown in the Home app.

key.title: Local Key
key.description: The Tuya local key. Enter it exactly as provided; symbol keys are supported.

tuyaId.title: Local Device ID Override (advanced)
tuyaId.description: Optional. The device's CURRENT local Tuya ID (gwId) used for LAN control. Set this only if the device's state updates correctly but it will not respond to control — e.g. after re-pairing in Smart Life, which changes the device ID. Find it with 'tinytuya scan'. Leave blank to use the Device ID above.
